response.overview: 13-year-old Antek, grieving his mother’s death, searches for a way to contact her. He comes across the GHOSTPHONE — a mysterious device resembling a 1980s television set that lets him reach his mom's spirit. She appears on the CRT screen, flickering to life in a swirl of colorful analog feedback. Just as Antek nears the conversation he longs for, his absent, rationalist father Paweł steps in, determined to keep his son from believing in such “nonsense.”
response.tagline: The dead are only a GHOSTPHONE call away.
response.title: noise of waves
